text:
The charts spinning on load can happen when data isn't reaching your browser properly. A few things to try:

- Hard refresh (Cmd+Shift+R on Mac, Ctrl+Shift+R on Windows) to clear your cache.
- Try the web app at novig.com if you haven't already.
- Check if you're on a VPN or proxy — those sometimes block chart data.

If it's still stuck after that, let us know and we'll loop in engineering. They may need your browser console errors (right-click → Inspect → Console tab) to see what's actually failing.

Novig Support
